content: We can reframe the task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a base structure that can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that requires no extra training, external supervision, or external test cases. This hybrid approach leverages the zero-overhead advantage of vanilla Self-Refine while fixing its limitation of getting stuck in local feedback loops caused by single-perspective self-critique.
